seo.title: Many Paths to Financial Heaven I Aashish Sommaiya
seo.description: Wealth Has Many Roads – Pick What Works for You! In this insightful conversation, Aashish Sommaiya, CEO of WhiteOak Capital, unpacks what truly drives

takeaways: The first question is not which fund to buy, it is why you are investing at all, and Aashish Sommaiya argues that clarity about your goal comes before any product.
Your destination decides your vehicle, so define what the money is for before choosing between mutual funds, direct equity, FDs, crypto or real estate.
There is no single perfect way to build wealth, the honest move is to explore every option while understanding the fundamental nature of each product.
Stay inside regulated products, and let your own internal clarity guide the choice rather than the noise of market trends.
How you handle your emotions matters more to investing outcomes than following macroeconomics.
